# RevokeUserSubscriptionBodyDto


## Properties

Name | Type | Description | Notes
------------ | ------------- | ------------- | -------------
**revoke_only_passwords** | **bool** | Optional. If true, only passwords will be revoked, without changing the short UUID (Subscription URL). | [optional] [default to False]
**short_uuid** | **str** | Optional. If not provided, a new short UUID will be generated by Remnawave. Please note that it is strongly recommended to allow Remnawave to generate the short UUID. | [optional]
